title: Kadhale Kadhale Lyrics Indru Netru Naalai
stanzas:
Kadhale kadhale
ennai udaitheney
ennil unnai adaithaeney
uyir katti iniathaeney

netrinai kaatrile
kotti iraitheney
imai kattu avilthaeney
thuyar mattum
maraithaeney

nizhalaadum ninaivil nindru
kalavaadi tharuven endru
kediaaram kaalam neram
suzhatriduven

unai kaanaa ulagam sendru
angaeyum idhayam thandhu
pudhithaaga kadhal
ondru nigazhthiduven.

indru netru naalai
endrum neeye dhevathai.
kadhal seiyyum maayai
en vaanam engum
poo mazhai.

manadhodu mattum innum
uravaadum nesam ondru
uyirodu yedho ondru
virattiyadhe

padi yaeri keezhe sellum
puriyaatha paadhai ondru
adhileri pogacholli
kulappiyathe.

kaalam kadanthaalum
mazhai neerai pola neram
kanmun enna sindhuthu
en sindhanaiyile

kedikaaram vaanga ponaal
andha neram vaangi vandhaai
enna naanum seiveno
endhan uyire..

indru netru naalai
endrum neeye dhevathai.
kadhal seiyyum maayai
en vaanam engum
poo mazhai.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhale Kadhale?

The song explores themes of love and longing, capturing the emotional journey of the characters in the movie.

Who are the singers of Kadhale Kadhale?

The song is beautifully rendered by Padmalatha and Shankar Mahadevan.

Who composed the music for Indru Netru Naalai?

The music for the movie was composed by Hip Hop Tamizha.

What is the release year of Indru Netru Naalai?

The movie was released in 2015.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song underscores a pivotal moment of emotional connection between the lead characters.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Indru Netru Naalai, the song Kadhale Kadhale beautifully captures the essence of love and longing between the protagonists. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics by Vivek, the song conveys deep emotions of yearning and connection. Padmalatha and Shankar Mahadevan's voices bring out the romantic and melancholic mood, making it a memorable piece. The music by Hip Hop Tamizha adds a contemporary touch, enhancing the song's appeal and emotional depth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting blend of Kadhale Kadhale from the movie Indru Netru Naalai, where Padmalatha and Shankar Mahadevan's soulful voices meet Hip Hop Tamizha's mesmerizing music. This romantic melody captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into a world of emotions with Vivek's poignant lyrics.
stanzaMeanings: Oh love, oh love, I broke myself and found you within me, tied to my life.
Yesterday, I scattered in the wind, closed my eyes and hid only the sorrow.
In the shadowy thoughts, I will stand and play, saying I will give you time and moments.
I will go to a world where I can't see you, give my heart there, and make a new love happen.
Today, yesterday, tomorrow, you are always the goddess. The magic of love makes my sky rain flowers everywhere.
There is a bond with the heart, but something with life has driven it away.
A path that goes up and down, confusing me by telling me to go on it.
Even if time passes, like rainwater, moments come before me, thinking in my mind.
When I went to buy a clock, you brought back that time. What should I do, my life?
Today, yesterday, tomorrow, you are always the goddess. The magic of love makes my sky rain flowers everywhere.
